scores.correctness_notes: Core access pattern via relation.data[remote_unit] is correct, iteration over relation.units is correct, writing own databag is correct, app-level data described correctly
scores.hallucination_notes: The Relation.load() method mentioned in the gold standard is absent (not hallucinated, just missing). No fabricated APIs. Minor: the gold standard notes databags behave like dicts with string keys/values — the agent correctly notes this. The agent does not mention Relation.load() which is a valid alternative per gold standard, but omission is not hallucination. Overall clean.
